_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Vast majority of vasovasostomies are performed to reverse a prior vasectomy
Vasovasostomies are also designed to bypass an obstruction in the male genital tract in men who are sterile
A vasovasostomy may also be performed on occasion to relieve pain associated with post-vasectomy pain syndrome
Occasionally indicated for repair of an iatrogenic vasal injury secondary to prior surgery (eg, inguinal herniorrhaphy)

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) with treatment details

ppd_preauth.q: Did the clinical indications justify the need for surgery?
Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, planned line of treatment, indication for procedure?
Pre-operative scrotal examination indicative of surgery?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advice at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical indications not documented or do not justify the need for surgery.
Clinical notes missing or incomplete regarding evaluation findings, indication for procedure, or planned line of management.
Pre-operative scrotal examination findings not documented or not indicative of surgery.
Detailed Indoor Case Papers (ICPs) missing or incomplete, lacking daily vitals and line of treatment.
Detailed Procedure/Operative Notes missing or incomplete.
Discharge summary missing or lacks follow-up advice.

clinical_key_pointers: A vasovasostomy is a surgical procedure in which the effects of a vasectomy (male sterilization) are reversed. Vasovasostomy involves the anastomosis of segments of the vas deferens above and below an obstruction.
additional_information.pre_op_preparation: Before a vasovasostomy is performed, the patient will undergo a preoperative assessment, including a physical examination of the scrotum and a medical history of prior vasectomy surgery.
